sentences.translation: Grupa mladih je odlučila da se dobrovoljno angažuje.
sentences.translationEn: A group of young people decided to volunteer.

sentences.translation: Otišli su u gradski park i očistili ga.
sentences.translationEn: They went to the city park and cleaned it.

sentences.translation: Osjećali su ponos što su pomogli zajednici.
sentences.translationEn: They felt proud because they helped the community.

sentences.translation: Ljudi su jako voljeli ovu inicijativu.
sentences.translationEn: People loved this initiative a lot.
